one_time_description: Large Government Business Enterprise income of $8,327,164 recognized via modified equity method, subject to qualified audit opinion due to inability to verify equity pick-up of $2,247,817
economic_notes: GBEs include Skw'lax Investments Inc., 0990532 B.C. Ltd., and Skw'lax Timber Limited Partnership. Wildfire in July 2023 destroyed 34 homes and various assets; insurance and additional funding expected to cover losses. Gas station asset added during year at cost of $1,201,754.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED on two bases: (1) inability to obtain sufficient audit evidence on GBE equity pick-up of $2,247,817 for Skw'lax Investments Inc., 0990532 BC Ltd., and Skw'lax Timber Limited Partnership; (2) failure to complete PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations assessment as required from April 1, 2022. Comparative figures restated per Note 21. Social Housing is the only fully consolidated subsidiary. Three GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis with total investment of $16,228,366. Wildfire subsequent event in July 2023 destroyed 34 homes. No remuneration schedule included in the extracted text. OSR calculated as total revenue ($33,123,781) minus all government transfers (ISC $5,649,110 + DFO $101,000 + Province of BC $4,531,467 + NRCan $212,094 + CMHC $282,916 + FNHA $2,097,248 = $12,873,835) plus FNGST $204,982 treated as own-source = OSR approximately $20,249,946; total_government_transfers excludes FNGST and taxation as own-source.
